metadata.review_policy: Any new or changed install-script package requires explicit allowlist review before it can land.

sharp.reason: Next.js optionally installs sharp native binaries for image optimization on supported platforms.

supabase.reason: The Supabase CLI downloads its reviewed binary during install for local backup and restore operations.

unrs-resolver.reason: eslint-import-resolver-typescript depends on the reviewed napi postinstall resolver binding for local linting.
